mapper.select: select * from (select sbbh,MAX(time) as time from cgq_sj group by sbbh) as temp left join cgq_sj as t on temp.sbbh=t.sbbh and temp.time=t.time order by t.sbbh asc

select b.sbbh as name,IFNULL(FLOOR(sum(a.count)),0) as count from cgq_yc a right join (select sbbh from cgq_sbgl)b on a.sbbh = b.sbbh and a.state = #{state} and to_days(a.time) = to_days(now()) group by b.sbbh

select DATE_FORMAT(str_to_date(name,'%Y-%m-%d'),'%m.%d') as name,count from (select DATE_FORMAT(time,'%Y-%m-%d') as name,round(avg(fldj),2) as count from cgq_sj where sbbh = #{sbbh}
and time between DATE_FORMAT(#{kssj},'%Y-%m-%d') and DATE_FORMAT(#{jssj},'%Y-%m-%d')
and time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
group by DATE_FORMAT(time,'%Y-%m-%d'))t
